name: Heartbeat Monitor V1 Lean
description: 5-minute scheduled health monitor with DMS start/completion lifecycle, circuit reset probe with absorbed recovery event, error rate trend with per-workflow breakdown and direction arrows, orphan detection with alert memory and confidence state, activation monitoring with edge-triggered alerts, MD5 heartbeat dedup with HEALTHY/DEGRADED/CRITICAL verdict and recovery banner with subsystem context, consolidated orphan/API-error alert path, silent healthy notifications, compact HTML links, and delivery-independent event logging.

parameters.query:
WITH recover_open AS (
  UPDATE circuit_state
  SET status = 'half_open', updated_at = NOW(), half_open_at = NOW()
  WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'
    AND status = 'open'
    AND last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
  RETURNING circuit_key, status, 'open' AS previous_status,
    'heartbeat-recovery-' || EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER AS trace_id,
    CASE WHEN 'open' = 'open' THEN 5 ELSE 10 END AS cooldown_minutes
),
reset_half_open AS (
  UPDATE circuit_state
  SET status = 'closed', error_count = 0, updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'
    AND status = 'half_open'
    AND last_error_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM recover_open)
  RETURNING circuit_key, status, 'half_open' AS previous_status,
    'heartbeat-recovery-' || EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER AS trace_id,
    CASE WHEN 'half_open' = 'open' THEN 5 ELSE 10 END AS cooldown_minutes
)
SELECT circuit_key, status, previous_status, trace_id, cooldown_minutes FROM recover_open
UNION ALL
SELECT circuit_key, status, previous_status, trace_id, cooldown_minutes FROM reset_half_open

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, severity, status, payload)
VALUES (
  ($1::jsonb)->>'traceId',
  'circuit_transition',
  'Heartbeat Monitor',
  'heartbeat',
  'info',
  ($1::jsonb)->>'to',
  jsonb_build_object('from', ($1::jsonb)->>'from', 'to', ($1::jsonb)->>'to', 'reason', 'heartbeat_recovery_probe', 'cooldown_minutes', (($1::jsonb)->>'cooldownMinutes')::integer)
)

WITH cs AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT status FROM circuit_state WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'),
      'closed'
    ) AS circuit_status,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT error_count FROM circuit_state WHERE circuit_key = 'supervisor'),
      0
    ) AS error_count
),
evt AS (
  SELECT event_type, workflow_name, created_at, status
  FROM supervisor_events
  WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'error_alert' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS errors_last_hour,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'error_alert') AS errors_last_24h,
    MAX(created_at) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'heartbeat') AS last_heartbeat_at,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'error_alert' AND status = 'retry_submitted' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS retries_last_hour,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE event_type = 'error_alert' AND status = 'retry_submitted') AS retries_last_24h
  FROM evt
),
top_src AS (
  SELECT workflow_name, COUNT(*) AS error_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') AS errors_1h
  FROM evt
  WHERE event_type = 'error_alert'
  GROUP BY workflow_name
  ORDER BY error_count DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT
  cs.circuit_status,
  cs.error_count,
  agg.errors_last_hour,
  agg.errors_last_24h,
  agg.last_heartbeat_at,
  agg.retries_last_hour,
  agg.retries_last_24h,
  COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(row_to_json(t)) FROM top_src t), '[]'::jsonb) AS top_error_sources
FROM cs CROSS JOIN agg

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, severity, status, payload)
SELECT
  'orphan-' || (o->>'executionId') || '-' || EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER,
  'orphan_detected',
  o->>'workflowName',
  o->>'executionId',
  'warning',
  'detected',
  jsonb_build_object('orphanCount', (o->>'orphanCount')::integer, 'runningMinutes', (o->>'runningMinutes')::integer, 'workflowId', o->>'workflowId')
FROM jsonb_array_elements($1::jsonb) AS o
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO supervisor_events (trace_id, event_type, workflow_name, execution_id, severity, status, payload)
VALUES (
  'heartbeat-' || EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW())::INTEGER,
  'heartbeat',
  'Heartbeat Monitor',
  'heartbeat',
  CASE WHEN ($1::jsonb)->>'isDegraded' = 'true' THEN 'warning' ELSE 'info' END,
  CASE WHEN ($1::jsonb)->>'isDegraded' = 'true' THEN 'degraded' ELSE 'healthy' END,
  $1::jsonb
)

options.queryReplacement: ={{ JSON.stringify({ isDegraded: String($json.isDegraded), circuit_status: $json.circuit_status, error_count: $json.error_count, errors_last_hour: $json.errors_last_hour, errors_last_24h: $json.errors_last_24h, retries_last_hour: $json.retries_last_hour, retries_last_24h: $json.retries_last_24h, sendReason: $json.sendReason, verdict: $json.verdict, emergency_cache_count: $json.emergency_cache_count, dms_failure_active: String($json.dms_failure_active), orphan_state: $json.orphan_state, orphan_count: $json.orphan_count, activation_uncertain: String($json.activation_uncertain), activation_issue: String($json.activation_issue) }) }}

parameters.content:
## 💓 Heartbeat Monitor V1 Lean (Final Build)
**Schedule → DMS Start → Circuit Reset → Status → Orphans → Activation → Health Eval → Heartbeat → DMS Complete**

**25 executable nodes. 114 approved changes across 10 review cycles.**

- True end-of-run DMS: /start at beginning, success ping after Clear Cache
- DMS state uses previous-cycle flag from staticData (5-min lag, acceptable)
- Circuit recovery absorbed into CTE SQL output columns
- CTE-consolidated System Status with COALESCE defaults + retry counts
- Orphan path consolidated: API error + orphans unified into single IF
- Orphan alert memory: first detection + hourly re-alert only
- Orphan confidence state: none/found/uncertain/api_error
- API unreachable edge-triggered (hash + 1-hour re-alert)
- Activation edge-triggered via SHA-1 state hash
- HEALTHY/DEGRADED/CRITICAL verdict with recovery banner + subsystem context
- Trend direction arrows + per-workflow top-5 breakdown + retry visibility
- Hash stability: volatile counters bucketed before hashing
- Silent healthy heartbeats (disable_notification)
- Compact HTML links + disabled web page previews
- Entity-safe truncation everywhere
- Manila timezone formatting
- Heartbeat Local Cache (honest labeling, no cross-workflow claims)
